description: Implement read-only Protocol Validation & Compliance API natively in the MCP server, specifically focusing on the verify_execution_compliance tool to physically enforce JSON contracts via Git diffs.
scope: Add a new MCP tool to src/mcp-server/src/index.ts. The tool will accept a task baseline commit and a contract path, run 'git diff --name-only <baseline>', read the contract's 'allowed_files', and return an evaluation of any architecture drift/uncontracted file touches.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO workflow mutation (write APIs). NO auto-approval logic. NO redesign of the reviewer identity. NO protocol evolution topics.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to implement state mutators or workflow progression APIs.
Attempting to execute implementation before an explicit, independent contract review decision is provided.
